inline_comments.message:
I have started using a control character as a delimiter when needed in order to avoid this kind of problem:

d=$'\001'
sedArgs=("sed" "-i")
   . . .
sedArgs+=("-e" "s${d}\${{${name}}}${d}${value}${d}g")
   . . .
"${sedArgs[@]}" ${files}

Note that this is building an array rather than a single string -- this still works if 'value' has spaces or tabs.
